title: MANGA NGE When will it finish
display_title: MANGA NGE When will it finish
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] When will it finish!?             Quote Post by Zkh » Tue Apr 10, 2007 3:34 pm Do you think the manga will finish before 2010? I mean come on, it's been like 11 years since he started the damn thing. Is he waiting to do volume 11 until after the first new movie is released? I WANT MY MANGA! (also volume 10 is out in English today, I believe)

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Apr 10, 2007 3:42 pm He is probably waiting for Anno to finish with webuild so he can refresh his memory on how to write a decent story. He needs the help too.

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Tue Apr 10, 2007 3:50 pm Hunter21 wrote: He is probably waiting for Anno to finish with webuild so he can refresh his memory on how to write a decent story. He needs the help too.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Tue Apr 10, 2007 3:53 pm Hunter21 wrote: He is probably waiting for Anno to finish with webuild so he can refresh his memory on how to write a decent story. He needs the help too.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Apr 10, 2007 4:00 pm He is a great artist I will give him that. But his story telling abilities leave me wanting much more. I think he should have handed of the story boards off to someone else to write and just concentrated on the drawing aspect. That is what he seems best at.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Apr 10, 2007 5:51 pm WHEN WILL IT FINISH!?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Apr 15, 2007 12:11 am Check it out, guys. I just preordered Duke Nukem Forever and Mega Man Legends 3.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Apr 16, 2007 1:39 am The manga will finish sometime between 4th and 5th Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sat May 05, 2007 12:00 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: Check it out, guys. I just preordered Duke Nukem Forever and Mega Man Legends 3.

[]:             Quote Post by CypressPhoenix » Sun May 06, 2007 1:30 am In the afterword of vol. 10, I think it kinda gives you a time when it MIGHT... and I mean might be done... I can't remember but I think it says it takes Sadamoto one year to write six stages and stuff... and then it takes like... two months to translate them or something... I'm not even sure if I'm correct, so yeah. XD
